rationale: The cited paper appears in a single grouped citation in the definitions section, where it is used as an example of nonconversational eWOM (online reviews) that is outside the focal scope of this study. The citing paper uses it to delimit what counts as a WOM conversation and to caution against direct comparison, not to build hypotheses, borrow methods, or interpret results from it specifically. Because the role is a brief background/example mention without a distinct functional dependence on this specific paper, the citation is mention-only.
